sentences.arabic: يُعَدُّ الْفُطُورُ الْعَرَبِيُّ وَجْبَةً غَنِيَّةً وَمُتَنَوِّعَةً جِدًّا.
sentences.translation: Arapski doručak se smatra veoma bogatim i raznovrsnim obrokom.
sentences.translationEn: Arab breakfast is considered a very rich and diverse meal.

sentences.arabic: يَأْكُلُ النَّاسُ الْفُولَ الْمُدَمَّسَ وَالْحُمُّصَ مَعَ الْخُبْزِ الطَّازَجِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi jedu ful medames i hummus sa svježim hljebom.
sentences.translationEn: People eat fava beans and hummus with fresh bread.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا يُقَدَّمُ الزَّيْتُ وَالزَّعْتَرُ وَالْأَجْبَانُ عَلَى الطَّاوِلَةِ كُلَّ صَبَاحٍ.
sentences.translation: Također se svako jutro na stolu poslužuju maslinovo ulje, majčina dušica i sirevi.
sentences.translationEn: Also, olive oil, za'atar, and cheeses are served on the table every morning.

sentences.arabic: يَشْرَبُ الْجَمِيعُ الشَّايَ السَّاخِنَ فِي نِهَايَةِ هَذِهِ الْوَجْبَةِ.
sentences.translation: Svi piju topli čaj na kraju ovog obroka.
sentences.translationEn: Everyone drinks hot tea at the end of this meal.
